title: Rolling 3-Month Signal IC Health Check with Auto-Reweight Trigger
summary: Implement a lightweight weekly job that computes per-dimension rolling Information Coefficient (Spearman correlation between signal score and forward 5-day return) over a 60-trading-day window. When any dimension's IC drops below a threshold (e.g., IC < 0.02 for 3 consecutive weeks), automatically reduce its weight in the composite score and flag it for human review. This directly addresses the finding that alpha decays to near zero by month 10-12 without active monitoring.
expected_impact: QuantBench 2025 study on US stocks 2021-2023 shows 3-month rolling retraining consistently produced best out-of-sample performance vs 6-month, 12-month, and static; alpha decay costs US markets ~5.6% annually without adaptive updates — recovery of even 30% of this drag would represent meaningful Sharpe improvement.
